hooks.command: INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '(migrate reset|db execute|db push|accept-data-loss|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM|ALTER TABLE.*DROP)'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: Destructive database command detected'; echo 'This command can wipe production data.'; echo 'If you really need this, ask the user to run it manually.'; exit 1; fi; exit 0

BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"; echo "🔍 PRE-COMMIT BUILD VALIDATION"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"; echo "Branch: $BRANCH"; echo ""; echo "Step 1: TypeScript Compilation"; pnpm tsc --noEmit > /tmp/tsc-output.txt 2>&1 || TSC_EXIT=$?; if [ ! -z "$TSC_EXIT" ]; then TSC_ERROR_COUNT=$(wc -l < /tmp/tsc-output.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "❌ TypeScript: $TSC_ERROR_COUNT errors found"; head -n 10 /tmp/tsc-output.txt 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "💡 Fix: Run 'pnpm tsc --noEmit' to see all errors"; echo "💡 Auto-fix: Many TypeScript errors can be auto-fixed"; ERRORS_FOUND=1; else echo "✅ TypeScript: 0 errors"; fi; echo ""; echo "Step 2: Prisma Client Sync"; if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q "prisma/schema.prisma\|prisma/models/"; then echo "🔍 Prisma schema changed, checking client sync..."; if [ -f node_modules/.prisma/client/index.d.ts ]; then SCHEMA_TIME=$(stat -c %Y prisma/schema.prisma 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m prisma/schema.prisma 2>/dev/null || echo 0); CLIENT_TIME=$(stat -c %Y node_modules/.prisma/client/index.d.ts 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m node_modules/.prisma/client/index.d.ts 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ $SCHEMA_TIME -gt $CLIENT_TIME ]; then echo "⚠️  Prisma: Client out of sync (schema modified after client generation)"; echo "💡 Fix: Run 'pnpm prisma generate' to regenerate client"; ERRORS_FOUND=1; else echo "✅ Prisma: Client up to date"; fi; else echo "⚠️  Prisma: Client not found"; echo "💡 Fix: Run 'pnpm prisma generate'"; ERRORS_FOUND=1; fi; else echo "✅ Prisma: No schema changes detected"; fi; echo ""; echo "Step 3: Linting"; pnpm lint --quiet 2>&1 | head -n 10 || LINT_EXIT=$?; if [ ! -z "$LINT_EXIT" ]; then echo "❌ ESLint: Errors found"; echo "💡 Fix: Run 'pnpm lint --fix' to auto-fix"; ERRORS_FOUND=1; else echo "✅ ESLint: No errors"; fi; echo ""; echo "Step 4: Running Tests (Changed Files)"; pnpm test --changed --silent --run 2>&1 | grep -E "(PASS|FAIL|Test Suites)" || TEST_EXIT=$?; if [ ! -z "$TEST_EXIT" ]; then echo "❌ Tests: Failed"; ERRORS_FOUND=1; else echo "✅ Tests: Passed"; fi; echo ""; echo "Step 5: Seed Safety Check"; if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q 'prisma/seeds/'; then if git diff --cached -- 'prisma/seeds/' | grep -qE '(deleteMany|\.delete\(|TRUNCATE|DROP|prisma\.\$executeRaw)'; then echo "❌ Seed Safety: Destructive operation detected in seed files"; echo "💡 Review: deleteMany, .delete(), TRUNCATE, DROP, or \$executeRaw found"; ERRORS_FOUND=1; else echo "✅ Seed Safety: No destructive operations"; fi; else echo "✅ Seed Safety: No seed files changed"; fi; echo ""; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"; if [ ! -z "$ERRORS_FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ PRE-COMMIT VALIDATION FAILED"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"; echo ""; echo "Errors detected. Please fix before committing."; echo ""; echo "Quick Fixes:"; echo "  - TypeScript errors: Fix manually or check for auto-fix patterns"; echo "  - Prisma sync: pnpm prisma generate"; echo "  - Linting: pnpm lint --fix"; echo "  - Tests: Fix failing tests"; echo ""; echo "Documentation: /docs/build"; echo ""; if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "production" ]; then echo "🚫 COMMIT BLOCKED on protected branch ($BRANCH)"; exit 1; else echo "⚠️  You can override with: git commit --no-verify"; echo "   (Not recommended - fix errors before merging to main)"; exit 1; fi; else echo "✅ ALL PRE-COMMIT CHECKS PASSED"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"; echo ""; exit 0; fi

BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "🔍 Pre-Push Build Verification (Branch: $BRANCH)"; echo ""; echo "Running production build..."; pnpm build 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" || BUILD_EXIT=$?; echo "Checking Prettier formatting..."; npx prettier --check "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}" --log-level error 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" || PRETTIER_EXIT=$?; echo ""; if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "production" ]; then if [ ! -z "$BUILD_EXIT" ] || [ ! -z "$PRETTIER_EXIT" ]; then echo "❌ PUSH BLOCKED: Build or formatting checks failed on protected branch ($BRANCH)"; echo "Fix errors above before pushing to $BRANCH"; exit 1; fi; else if [ ! -z "$BUILD_EXIT" ] || [ ! -z "$PRETTIER_EXIT" ]; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: Build or formatting checks failed on feature branch ($BRANCH)"; echo "Allowing push, but please fix errors before merging to main"; fi; fi; echo "✅ Pre-Push checks passed"; exit 0

echo "🔄 Pre-Merge Validation"; echo "Running comprehensive checks before merge..."; echo ""; echo "1. Running all tests..."; pnpm test --run 2>&1 | grep -E "(PASS|FAIL|Test Suites)" || TEST_EXIT=$?; echo ""; echo "2. Checking build..."; pnpm build 2>&1 | grep -E "(✓|✗|error|Error)" || BUILD_EXIT=$?; echo ""; echo "3. Checking for merge conflicts..."; git diff --check || CONFLICT_EXIT=$?; echo ""; if [ ! -z "$TEST_EXIT" ] || [ ! -z "$BUILD_EXIT" ] || [ ! -z "$CONFLICT_EXIT" ]; then echo "❌ MERGE BLOCKED: Pre-merge checks failed"; echo "Please fix all issues before merging"; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ All pre-merge checks passed"; exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx?$|jsx?$"; then if grep -nE "(redirect|href|push|replace).*\/s\/" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v revalidatePath | grep -v "// internal" | head -5; then echo "WARNING: Possible /s/ URL leak in client-facing code"; echo "Use clean paths without /s/subdomain segment"; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx?$|jsx?$"; then if grep -nE "(redirect|href|push|replace).*\/s\/" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v revalidatePath | grep -v "// internal" | head -5; then echo "WARNING: Possible /s/ URL leak in client-facing code"; echo "Use clean paths without /s/subdomain segment"; fi; fi; exit 0

echo "📝 Post-Commit Actions"; COMMIT_MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null); if [ ! -z "$COMMIT_MSG" ]; then if echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|refactor|perf|docs|style|test|chore|build|ci)'; then echo "✅ Commit message follows conventional format"; if [ -f CHANGELOG.md ] && echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix)'; then echo "💡 Consider updating CHANGELOG.md for this $(echo $COMMIT_MSG | cut -d: -f1) commit"; fi; else echo "💡 Consider using conventional commit format: feat|fix|refactor|perf|docs|style|test|chore|build|ci"; fi; fi; echo "Commit successful! Run 'git push' when ready to share your changes."; exit 0

echo '🚀 HOGWARTS - MANUAL DEPLOY MODE'; echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; echo 'Stack: Next.js 15 + React 19 + Prisma + TypeScript'; echo ''; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); echo "📊 Branch: $BRANCH"; echo ''; echo '📝 WORKFLOW:'; echo '  • Edits: Prettier auto-formats (no push)'; echo '  • When ready: Say "push" to deploy'; echo '  • Checklist → Commit → Push → Vercel'; echo ''; exit 0

echo ''; echo '═══════════════════════════════════════'; echo '📊 SESSION END'; echo '═══════════════════════════════════════'; UNCOMMITTED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$UNCOMMITTED" -gt 0 ]; then echo "📝 $UNCOMMITTED uncommitted changes"; echo '💡 Say "push" to deploy when ready'; else echo '✅ No uncommitted changes'; fi; echo '═══════════════════════════════════════'; exit 0

echo "🚨 Error Detection Hook Activated"; TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo 'timestamp unavailable'); echo "Event occurred at: $TIMESTAMP"; if [ ! -d .claude ]; then mkdir -p .claude; fi; echo "[$TIMESTAMP] Tool or operation stopped/failed" >> .claude/error.log 2>/dev/null || true; echo "💡 Common fixes:"; echo "  - TypeScript errors: Run 'pnpm tsc --noEmit' to see details"; echo "  - Missing dependencies: Run 'pnpm install'"; echo "  - Prisma errors: Run 'pnpm prisma generate'"; echo "  - Linting errors: Run 'pnpm lint --fix'"; echo "Event logged to .claude/error.log"; exit 0
